full_text:
Sima Tong (Yada) 司馬同 (雅達)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sima Tong (司馬同), styledYada (雅達). 7th son of Sima Fang, he served on the staff of the Director of Retainers and was enfeoffed. Sima Tong was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
